chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 899 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 20.03.2025 Mr. Kamber Ali Kuber, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for Respondent No.6 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the petitioner nor any intimation is received. This petition is pending since, 2024. Perusal of the record reflects that lastly this petition was fixed in Court on 22.10.2024, thereafter the petitioner has not taken any efforts to get it fixed in Court for hearing. The conduct of the petitioner depicts either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or he has lost interest to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
